education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology
education.institute: Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology, Greater Noida

experience.description: Delivered end-to-end onboarding and production go-live for 10+ international merchants, validating APIs, payment configurations, and integration readiness across 8+ payment methods. Performed RCA on production payment issues using API tracing, service log correlation, transaction lifecycle analysis, and integration-flow debugging across distributed payment systems. Partnered with engineering, product, and operations teams to resolve integration blockers, manage UAT, validate releases, and improve production reliability.

Developed core capabilities for 2+ internal AI-powered engineering tools used for production debugging, payment transaction analysis, and system observability, improving debugging efficiency by 30%. Performed root cause analysis through API tracing, service log correlation, and end-to-end payment transaction analysis across distributed payment services. Implemented workflow improvements that accelerated production issue investigation and improved engineering productivity.

achievements.title: Technical Lead

achievements.title: Team Lead
achievements.description: Led a 4-member team to a Top 5 finish out of 100+ teams.
